snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

snippet.title: 给阿嬷的情书 ｜ Dear You | Official Trailer | 官方预告片
snippet.description:
《给阿嬷的情书》官方预告片释出 💌 全马GSC戏院6月18日上映！🇲🇾

“侨批”，是远赴南洋谋生的先辈们，寄回家乡的一封封家书与汇款。

它不仅承载着思念，更维系着漂泊异乡的人与故土亲人的牵挂。

那个没有即时通讯的年代，
最深的爱，从不挂在嘴边。
而是把辛苦攒下的血汗钱和一句“平安”，
装进信里，跨越山海寄回家。

#给阿嬷的情书 📪 纸短情长，唯爱不变
6月18日 全马GSC戏院上映 #做人有情有义 ❤️

💌 The Official Trailer for “Dear You” is Out! In GSC starting 18 June!🇲🇾

“Qiaopi” refers to letters and remittances sent home by early ancestors who journeyed to Nanyang.

More than just words on paper, they carried the weight of endless longing, anchoring those who were drifting in a foreign land to the loved ones they left behind.

In an era without instant messaging, the deepest love was never spoken aloud. Instead, it was hidden in hard-earned money, and a simple reassurance of “I am safe” sealed inside an envelope and sent across mountains and oceans, all the way back home.

📪 Letters may be short, but love never is.
#DearYou in GSC starting 18 June. 🤍

#电影给阿嬷的情书 #給阿嬤的情書

Di satu sisi, ONIC datang sebagai tim yang ingin melanjutkan dominasinya dan mempertahankan status mereka sebagai salah satu tim tersukses dalam sejarah MPL Indonesia.

Di sisi lain, Bigetron Esports hadir dengan ambisi besar untuk menghentikan era dominasi ONIC dan membuktikan bahwa mereka adalah raja baru yang layak menduduki singgasana.

Akankah ONIC kembali menorehkan sejarah dan mempertahankan gelar juaranya?
